REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350(B). MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT EXIST. SEE RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S ADDITIONAL FACTS, 8; SEE PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S SEPARATE STATEMENT OF FACTS, 6, 8, 11, 12, 16, OBJECTIONS TO PARAGRAPHS 8 AND 9 OF FRIESEN DECL. OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN ACCORDANCE WITH CCP SECTION 437C(G) AND CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; COURT REPORTER: RAQUEL SHARP, CSR #10619, RAQUEL@TRANSCRIPTLEGAL.COM, 925-226-8222 (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Abigail H. Wald for City and County of San Francisco, Defendant.
Andrew Catterall for 25 Mason Street, LLC, Plaintiff (via Zoom).

Ms. Wald contested the court's tentative decision and provided oral argument. After ruling on evidentiary objections and hearing oral arguments, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Motion for Summary Judgment is Denied. Triable issues of fact exist. See Response to Plaintiff's Additional Facts, 8; See Plaintiff's Response to Defendant's Separate Statement of Facts, 6, 8, 11, 12, 16, Objections to paragraphs 8 and 9 of Friesen Decl. overruled.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order in accordance with CCP Section 437c(g) and CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, raquel@transcriptlegal.com, 925-226-8222 (D501)
